Hospital Number: 9990030
NHS Number: 9990000030
Name: Effy King
Gender: Female
DOB: 12/05/1957     Age: 69 Years | 62 DAY TARGET: 30/06/2024

Please note: If the 62 Day Breach Date is blank, the patient is on a 31 Day Pathway. Please ensure that the Decision To Treat Date is within 31 days of the Treatment Date.

Diagnosis: Rectal adenocarcinoma
ICD10 Code: C18.4
Differentiation: Poorly differentiated | Staging:  
Integrated TNM Stage: 
Dukes:

Progressive anaemia symptoms with new onset rectal bleeding; fatigue over 7 weeks. Additional symptoms include early satiety. Past medical history significant for hypertension.

Colonoscopy – mass in rectum 

Imaging:
MRI rectum on 15/04/2024: large polypoid lesion T1 sm1, N0, EMVI – CRM clear, PSW negative

Consider local excision with histology review at MDT.

Needs CT TAP
